title: Make It Yours
description: Reserve the entire restaurant for your celebration. We'll tailor the evening around your guests — custom menus, curated beverages, and service at your pace.
note: Minimums exclude tax, gratuity, and coordination fees. We'll work with you on menus, dietary needs, and beverage program.

title: Large Party
description: Book a section of the dining room for your group. Choose from à la carte service or a custom 3–5 course prix fixe menu.
note: A credit card is required to secure the reservation. Late cancellations for parties of 8 or more are subject to a $50 per guest fee.
